keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY HEART, CIRCULATION AND PULSE. Heart, circulation and pulse : Aco., Ars., Bell., Bry., Bufo-s., Cact., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Dig., Fer-p., Glo., Iod., Kali-c., Kalm., Lach., Lil-t., Lycps., Naj., Nat-m., Pho., Pul., Sep., Spig., Spo., Sul., Ver-a., Ver-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, blood , sepsis, etc. : Ail., Am-c., Arn., Ars., Bapt., Bell., Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Crot-h., Elaps., Fer., Kali-c., Kre., Lach., Merc., Mur-ac., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Pyro., Rhus-t., Sec-c., Sul-ac., Sul., Zin. Heart, circulation and pulse, bloodvessels : Aco., Amy-n., Ap., Arn., Bell., Carb-v., Fer., Flu-ac., Gels., Glo., Ham., Hyo., Lach., Lyc., Nat-m., Pho., Pul. , Sang., Sec-c., Sep., Sul., Thu., Vip., Zin. Heart, circulation and pulse, bloodvessels, distended, visible, varicose, etc. : Arn., Ars., Bell., Carb-v., Flu-ac., Ham., Plat., Pul., Sep., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, anxiety , with : Aco., Arn., Ars., Aur., Calc-c., Carb-v., Dig., Pho., Plat., Pul., Spig., Sul., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, apex (region) : Ap., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, arms , to : Alu., Bar-c., Cact., Carb-v., Dios., Glo., Kali-n., Kalm., Lat-m., Lyc., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, arms, left, to : Aco., Cact., Cimi., Dig., Kalm., Lach., Pho., Rhus-t., Spig., Tab., Tarn., Thyr. Heart, circulation and pulse, arms, to right : Kre., Pho., Phyt., Plb. Heart, circulation and pulse, backward (left scapula) : Agar., Alo., Cimi., Kali-c., Kalm., Laur., Lil-t., Mez., Naj., Rhus-t., Rum., Spig., Sul., Tab., Thu. Heart, circulation and pulse, burning : Aco., Ars., Aur., Bry., Calc-c., Hyo., Op., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul., Syph., Ver-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, coldness in : Aco., Ars., Rhus-t., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, congestion . see Generalities. Heart, circulation and pulse, constriction , grasped, squeezed, etc. : Cact., Iod., Lach., Lil-t. Heart, circulation and pulse, cutting : Colch. Heart, circulation and pulse, drinking , agg. : Con. Heart, circulation and pulse, empty , hollow, as if : Croc., Grap., Med., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, exertion , agg. : Cact., Dig., Nit-ac., Stap. Heart, circulation and pulse, fluttering , trembling, etc. : Calc-c., Chin., Cimi., Dig., Lil-t., Nat-m., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, hanging by a thread, as if : Aur., Kali-c., Lach., Nux-m. Heart, circulation and pulse, head , alternating with : Amy-n., Glo., Nux-m., Strop., Tab. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse , audible : Ang., Bism., Pul., Saba., Spig., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, body , over whole : Bell., Fer., Glo., Kali-c., Lach., Nat-m. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, ceasing , as if : Aur., Cic., Cimi., Conv., Dig., Gels., Lob., Rum., Vib. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, full : Ant-t., Bell., Bry., Calc-c., Canth., Coloc., Fer-p., Fer., Gels., Glo., Grap., Hep., Hyo., Merc., Mez., Nux-v., Pho., Ran-sc., Spo., Stram., Sul., Ver-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, full, strong, and : Aco., Bell., Bry. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, full, weak, and : Fer-p., Gels., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, hard : Aco., Am-c., Bell., Bry., Canth., Chin., Colch., Coloc., Fer., Grap., Hep., Hyo., Ign., Iod., Mez., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Plb., Sil., Stram., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, hard, single beats : Aur., Cact., Lach., Lil-t., Zin. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, intermittent : Ars., Carb-v., Dig., Kali-c., Mur-ac., Nat-m., Pho-ac., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, intermittent, every 3rd. beat : Nat-m., Nit-ac. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, irregular : Ant-c., Ars., Cact., Cann., Dig., Fer., Glo., Kali-c., Lach., Nat-m., Op., Spig., Stram., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, large : Aco., Fer-p., Pho., Ver-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation : Aco., Ars., Aur., Cact., Calc-c., Cham., Chin., Cratae., Dig., Iod., Kali-bi., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Spig., Sul., Thu., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation, anxious, nervous, etc. : Aco., Ars., Aur., Cof., Cratae., Dig., Lach., Nat-m., Pho-ac., Pul., Spig., Val., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation, continuous : Calc-c., Carb-v., Cratae., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation, exertion, from slight : Ars., Calc-c., Con., Rhus-t. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation, faintness, with : Lach., Lil-t., Pul., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation when sitting : Mag-m., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, palpitation, violent : Cratae., Lycps., Pul. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, quick : Aco., Ant-t., Ars., Bell., Glo., Lach., Nux-v., Pho., Rhus-t., Spo., Sul., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, shaking the body (Comp. Visible.) : Nat-m., Rhus-t. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, slow : Cic., Dig., Gels., Kalm., Myrt., Op., Sep., Stram., Ver-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, small : Aco., Ars., Cam., Carb-v., Cup., Hell., Rhus-t., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, tremulous : Ant-t., Calc-c., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, unequal : Agar., Ign., Op. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, visible (Comp. Visible.) : Ars., Iber., Kalm., Lach., Spig., Sul., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heart-beat and pulse, weak : Aco., Ant-t., Ars., Carb-v., Colch., Kali-c., Lach., Merc., Mur-ac., Naj., Pho-ac., Rhus-t., Ver-a. Heart, circulation and pulse, heaviness : Lil-t., Pul., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, inflamed , phlebitis, etc. : Aco., Ars., Chin., Ham., Kali-c., Lach., Pul., Spig., Sul., Vip. Heart, circulation and pulse, liver symptoms , with : Agar., Aur., Cact., Calc-c., Dig., Mag-m., Myrt. Heart, circulation and pulse, loose , as if : Aur., Crot-h. Heart, circulation and pulse, motion , agg. : Con. Heart, circulation and pulse, motion, amel. : Gels. Heart, circulation and pulse, right side , as if on : Bor., Ox-ac., Phyt. Heart, circulation and pulse, shocks at : Calc-c., Lith-c., Nux-v. Heart, circulation and pulse, sitting , agg. : Mag-m. Heart, circulation and pulse, sore , bruised : Ap., Arn., Bar-c., Cact., Cimi., Flu-ac., Lach., Lith-c., Nat-m., Spig. Heart, circulation and pulse, stagnated sensation : Lyc., Saba., Zin. Heart, circulation and pulse, stooling , agg. : Con. Heart, circulation and pulse, swelled , full, etc., as if : Asaf., Glo., Lach., Pyro., Sep., Sul. Heart, circulation and pulse, tired , feeling : Nux-v., Pyro., Rhus-t. Heart, circulation and pulse, twitching : Aesc., Arg-m., Cam. Heart, circulation and pulse, valves : Bar-c., Calc-c., Kali-c., Lach., Laur., Pho., Pul., Strop., Tarn. Heart, circulation and pulse, water , as if in : Bov., Bufo-s. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
